title: Argentinian Empanada with Beans
description: A classic Argentinian dish, these empanadas are filled with juicy beans and perfect for a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: resting empanada dough
ingredients.notes: Available at most Latin American markets

instructions: Roll out each piece of empanada dough into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of olive oil on each dough circle and spread evenly.
Add 1/4 cup of cooked beans to the center of each dough circle.
Sprinkle the chopped onion and minced garlic over the beans.
Sprinkle the cumin over the top.
Fold the dough in half to form a half-circle and press the edges together to seal.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
